parameters.title: ISMapper Parameters
parameters.description: Identify insertion sites positions in bacterial genomes

reference.title: Reference genome in GenBank format
reference.description: Path to reference genome in GenBank format

insertions.title: Multifasta file with insertion sequences
insertions.description: Path to multifasta file with insertion sequences to search for

min_clip.title: Minimum size for softclipped region
min_clip.description: Minimum size for softclipped region to be extracted from initial mapping

max_clip.title: Maximum size for softclipped region
max_clip.description: Maximum size for softclipped region to be extracted from initial mapping

cutoff.title: Minimum depth for mapped region
cutoff.description: Minimum depth for mapped region to be kept in bed file

novel_gap_size.title: Distance to merge novel IS elements
novel_gap_size.description: Distance in base pairs between left and right flanks to be called a novel IS element

min_range.title: Minimum percent size of IS
min_range.description: Minimum percent size of the IS element to be considered a hit

max_range.title: Maximum percent size of IS
max_range.description: Maximum percent size of the IS element to be considered a hit

merging.title: Distance to merge overlapping IS regions
merging.description: Value for merging overlapping IS element regions

ismap_all.title: Switch on all alignment reporting
ismap_all.description: Report all alignments (for paired reads, output reads pairs on the same chromosome only) in SAM file

ismap_minqual.title: Minimum mapping quality
ismap_minqual.description: Minimum mapping quality for reads to be retained
